title: QS100 Welding Arm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Arm.png|thumb|A QS100 on the [[Arc Hammer]]]]
'''QS100''' was a gigantic welding arm used for massive constructions. [[Kyle Katarn]] stumbled upon them twice during the [[Dark Trooper Project]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces Remaster]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-15 -->''[[Dark Forces Manual: Coded Transmissions]]''
*<!-- 1995-04-XX -->''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''
